case_title: CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC. VS. BEST BRANDS CONSUMER PRODUCTS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT BEST BRANDS CONSUMER PRODUCTS, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. James K. Kawahito of the Kawahito Law Group, Tel. No. 1-310-746-5300
appearing for the Plasintiff by Telephone appearance;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Center for Advanced Public Awareness, Inc.'s motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Best Brands Consumer Products, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
